title: Gergana Hristova
content:
People.ContactEmail ghristova@mtiplus.ca
Gergana Hristova has been a paralegal in immigration law since 2014 after graduating from Concordia with a Bachelor of Arts. Fluent in French, English, and Bulgarian, she has accrued extensive experience in the preparation, submission, and management of permanent residence applications towards admission to Canada under both provincial nominee and federal programs.
